'''Farwell Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. It was on there that [[Nescan Tal'yo]] killed a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] courier and gained a holocube detailing the Rebellion's main bases. It is parked in grid square R-7.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}} {{Mo}}
